target.field_a: Cryo-EM single-particle analysis and heterogeneity methods
target.field_c: Bacterial outer membrane vesicle (OMV) cargo sorting mechanism

hypotheses.title: Gaussian Mixture Model Analysis of Cryo-EM OMV Populations Distinguishes Biogenesis Pathways in P. aeruginosa
hypotheses.novelty_detail: No published work applies GMM/BIC to cryo-EM-derived whole-vesicle population analysis for OMV biogenesis pathway discrimination. Closest work uses neural network segmentation on mammalian EVs or fluorescence on bacterial OMVs.

hypotheses.title: Power Analysis for Subtomogram Averaging of OMV Budding Intermediates Sets Feasibility Boundary
issues: CITATION ERROR: Schur et al. 2016 cited as Nature but actually published in Science (vol. 353, pp. 506-508). Paper exists with correct content but journal is wrong.
UNVERIFIABLE: N_min formula ~ (d/r)^3 * SNR^-2 not found as published formula. General principle of resolution scaling with N is valid but specific formulation appears to be parametric construction.
Confidence downgraded from 8 to 6 due to citation error and unverifiable formula.
Groundedness downgraded from 9 to 6 due to same issues.
hypotheses.novelty_detail: No published power analysis for subtomogram averaging of OMV budding sites. Novel and valuable idea despite execution issues.

hypotheses.title: Periplasmic Chaperone DegP Co-localization with OMV Cargo Proteins Resolved by Cryo-ET Difference Mapping
hypotheses.novelty_detail: DegP role in OMV production established, cryo-ET difference mapping established, but combination for DegP localization at budding sites is novel. No published work found.

hypotheses.title: Machine Learning-Guided Template Matching Identifies OMV Cargo Proteins In Situ Without Labels
issues: Resolution limitation (20-30A) is a genuine risk for distinguishing similar OMPs, honestly acknowledged in hypothesis with appropriate 5/10 confidence.
hypotheses.novelty_detail: DeePiCt and TomoTwin both verified as real tools published in Nature Methods 2023. Neither has been applied to OMV cargo identification. Genuinely novel tool-transfer application.
